svg.title: kyber sk07 network topology overview
svg.desc: Network diagram for the kyber project showing VyOS router rtr-kyber connecting four segments: WAN to Internet via LRK, Internal 10.7.0.0/24 for users, DMZ 192.168.7.0/24 for servers, and an IPv6-only segment using ULA fd07:1:1:1::/64 with NPTv6 translation to 2001:1470:fffd:9b::/64.
svg.text: ✓ Interfaces (IPv4) · ✓ NPTv6 · ✓ SLAAC on eth3 · ✓ NTP · ✓ SSH
○ IPv6 on eth0–2 · ○ NAT44 · ○ DHCP · ○ Firewall · ○ DNS · ○ VPN
